basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Programme Coordinator and Community Facilitator Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Programme Coordinator and Community Facilitator Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website of TISS. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TISS Programme Coordinator and Community Facilitator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree Or Graduate qualification in social work (B.A. in Social Work/MSW)
qualification.details: Programme Coordinator: Master’s degree in Regulatory Policy and Governance, Urban Policy and Governance, Social Work, Disaster Management, Public Health, Environmental Studies, Geography, or a related discipline. Desirable: Skills and Experience in community-based risk assessment, disaster risk reduction, or participatory planning. Familiarity with climate change adaptation, environmental health and public health linkages. Prior experience in qualitative research, data collection, and analysis. Strong coordination and interpersonal skills for engaging with local institutions and communities. Knowledge of GIS and remote sensing. Community Facilitator: Graduate qualification in social work (B.A. in Social Work/MSW) from Central/Deemed/State-Recognised University. Prior experience of building relationships and working with any community as required by the projects goals is must. Expertise over: English, Hindi, Marathi.

salary_details.details: Programme Coordinator: 55000 pm Community Facilitator: 40000 pm

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the TISS Programme Coordinator and Community Facilitator posts is 09 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Programme Coordinator and Community Facilitator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by TISS for the Programme Coordinator and Community Facilitator positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Programme Coordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Programme Coordinator position, candidates must possess a Master’s degree in fields like Regulatory Policy and Governance, Urban Policy and Governance, Social Work, Disaster Management, Public Health, Environmental Studies, Geography, or a related discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Programme Coordinator and Community Facilitator roles?
faq.answer: The salary for the Programme Coordinator post is 55000 pm, and for the Community Facilitator post, it is 40000 pm.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for these positions through email.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the TISS Programme Coordinator and Community Facilitator posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves email application, followed by shortlisting of candidates, and finally an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum qualification for the Community Facilitator post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Community Facilitator post is a Graduate qualification in social work (B.A. in Social Work/MSW) from a Central/Deemed/State-Recognised University.

faq.question: Q9. Does TISS provide any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for more information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
